briefdescription.para: Type name for an AccelByte resource ID. Used to determine if we can cast the ID to a resource type.

detaileddescription.para: Type name for an AccelByte user ID. Used to determine if we can cast the ID to a user type.
Attribute key for a stored user account's publisher level avatar
Attribute key for a stored user account's game level avatar

briefdescription.para: Enum representing the types of authentication that the Identity interface can use with the AccelByte backend. Will automatically be determined by the OSS, or derived from another OSSs auth type.
Enum representing the types of chat room.

detaileddescription.para: Array of user IDs corresponding to players in a party in this session
Array of parties for the session, contains a nested array of user IDs for members

briefdescription.para: Does a simple check to see if the actual AccelByte ID for the composite is valid.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we get information about matchmaking teams
Delegate fired when we get information about matchmaking parties
